title: Alpha Theta Feedback
description: Dual-track alpha and theta rewards with beta-above and slow-wave inhibits.

threshold_window_sec.label: Adaptive window
threshold_window_sec.description: Rolling baseline window used to recompute adaptive thresholds.

clarity_at_threshold.label: Threshold clarity
clarity_at_threshold.description: Clarity value at each reward threshold.

alpha_reward_pct.label: Alpha reward time
alpha_reward_pct.description: Target percentage of time alpha stays above its reward threshold.

theta_reward_pct.label: Theta reward time
theta_reward_pct.description: Target percentage of time theta stays above its reward threshold.

slow_inhibit_pct.label: Slow inhibit time
slow_inhibit_pct.description: Target percentage of time delta sits above its inhibit threshold.

beta_inhibit_pct.label: Beta+ inhibit time
beta_inhibit_pct.description: Target percentage of time combined beta and hi-beta sits above its inhibit threshold.
